response:
Alex is a technical support specialist who spends a significant amount of time troubleshooting issues with Google Drive. Every day, Alex handles an average of 20 support tickets. Of these, 40% are related to file access issues, 35% are related to data security concerns, and the remaining are related to miscellaneous issues. On a particular day, Alex manages to resolve all of the file access and data security tickets, but only half of the miscellaneous issues. How many support tickets did Alex resolve in total on that day? Include keyword highway once in your response, keyword holiday twice in your response.

Module 1: Identify the initial 5-digit prime number  
The initial prime number is 12347.  

Module 2: Calculate the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number  
The sum of the squares of the digits of 12347 is 1² + 2² + 3² + 4² + 7² = 1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 49 = 79.  

Module 3: Generate the sequence of primes for each year from 13 to 19  
The prime number at age 14 is 101, at age 15 is 107, at age 16 is 131, at age 17 is 149, at age 18 is 167, and at age 19 is 179.  

Module 4: Validate that each prime adheres to the rule  
Each prime is greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number. player
